_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Sponge (SpongeNeo)
author: support@phosphor.host
description: SpongeNeo is the SpongeAPI implementation for Neoforge Loader.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# SpongeNeo Installation Script
#
# SpongeNeo is a NeoForge mod, not a standalone server, so a matching NeoForge
# server is installed and the SpongeNeo jar is dropped into the mods folder.
# Everything else mirrors the SpongeVanilla egg: same install image
# (ghcr.io/ptero-eggs/installers:debian), same variables, same v2 download API.
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
apt update
# jq/curl ship with the image; openjdk is only needed to run the NeoForge
# installer (installer + processors are Java 8 bytecode, so any JRE works).
apt install -y jq curl openjdk-17-jdk-headless

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

API="https://dl-api.spongepowered.org/v2/groups/org.spongepowered/artifacts/spongeneo"

# Resolve the SpongeNeo version to install
if [ -z "${SPONGE_VERSION}" ] || [ "${SPONGE_VERSION}" == "latest" ] || [ "${SPONGE_VERSION}" == "recommended" ]; then
  echo -e "Getting recommended SpongeNeo version"
  SPONGE_VERSION=$(curl -s "${API}/versions?recommended=true&limit=1&offset=0" | jq -r '.artifacts | keys[0]')
  if [ -z "${SPONGE_VERSION}" ] || [ "${SPONGE_VERSION}" == "null" ]; then
    echo -e "No recommended build available, falling back to the newest version"
    SPONGE_VERSION=$(curl -s "${API}/versions?limit=1&offset=0" | jq -r '.artifacts | keys[0]')
  fi
fi

echo -e "Using SpongeNeo version ${SPONGE_VERSION}"

# Pull the version metadata: Minecraft version, required NeoForge version and the
# download URL of the runnable mod jar (the "universal" classifier).
VERSION_DATA=$(curl -s "${API}/versions/${SPONGE_VERSION}")
MC_VERSION=$(echo "${VERSION_DATA}" | jq -r '.tags.minecraft')
NEO_VERSION=$(echo "${VERSION_DATA}" | jq -r '.tags.neoforge')
SV_DL_LINK=$(echo "${VERSION_DATA}" | jq -r '.assets[]? | select(.classifier == "universal" and .extension == "jar") | .downloadUrl')

if [ -z "${SV_DL_LINK}" ] || [ "${SV_DL_LINK}" == "null" ] || [ -z "${NEO_VERSION}" ] || [ "${NEO_VERSION}" == "null" ]; then
  echo -e "ERROR: could not resolve SpongeNeo version '${SPONGE_VERSION}'."
  echo -e "Check the version string against https://spongepowered.org/downloads/spongeneo"
  exit 1
fi

echo -e "Minecraft ${MC_VERSION}, NeoForge ${NEO_VERSION}"

# --- Install the matching NeoForge server ---
DOWNLOAD_LINK="https://maven.neoforged.net/releases/net/neoforged/neoforge/${NEO_VERSION}/neoforge-${NEO_VERSION}-installer.jar"

echo -e "Downloading NeoForge installer from ${DOWNLOAD_LINK}"
if ! curl --output /dev/null --silent --head --fail "${DOWNLOAD_LINK}"; then
  echo -e "ERROR: NeoForge installer for ${NEO_VERSION} is not available."
  exit 2
fi
curl -s -o installer.jar -sS "${DOWNLOAD_LINK}"

# Clean any previous NeoForge args/libraries so up/downgrades work
rm -rf libraries/net/neoforged/neoforge
rm -f unix_args.txt

echo -e "Installing NeoForge server"
java -jar installer.jar --installServer || { echo -e "\nNeoForge install failed for ${NEO_VERSION}. If memory is set to 0/unlimited, give the install some real memory."; exit 4; }
rm -f installer.jar

# NeoForge launches through generated JPMS args; symlink them for the egg startup
if ls libraries/net/neoforged/neoforge/*/unix_args.txt >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  ln -sf libraries/net/neoforged/neoforge/*/unix_args.txt unix_args.txt
else
  echo -e "ERROR: NeoForge unix_args.txt was not produced."
  exit 5
fi

# --- Drop SpongeNeo into the mods folder ---
mkdir -p mods
echo -e "Downloading SpongeNeo ${SPONGE_VERSION} into mods/"
curl -s -o "mods/spongeneo-${SPONGE_VERSION}.jar" "${SV_DL_LINK}"

if [ ! -f server.properties ]; then
  echo -e "Downloading default server.properties"
  curl -s -o server.properties https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ptero-eggs/game-eggs/main/minecraft/java/server.properties
fi

echo -e "Install for SpongeNeo is complete"

variables.name: Sponge Version
variables.description: SpongeNeo version to install (e.g. 1.21.10-21.10.64-17.0.0), or "latest"/"recommended". Also determines which NeoForge version is installed.

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: The name of the Jarfile to use when running SpongeVanilla.
